'''âk-f-z-w''' ('''kakafzewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:field|field]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-f-z-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:field|field]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-f-z-w
|-
! Lemma
| kakafzewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikafzewoko|thikafzewoko]] || [[word:jikafzewoko|jikafzewoko]] || [[word:shikafzewoko|shikafzewoko]] || [[word:kikafzewoko|kikafzewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukafzewoko|thuthukafzewoko]] || [[word:jujukafzewoko|jujukafzewoko]] || [[word:shushukafzewoko|shushukafzewoko]] || [[word:kukukafzewoko|kukukafzewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukafzewoko|thukafzewoko]] || [[word:jukafzewoko|jukafzewoko]] || [[word:shukafzewoko|shukafzewoko]] || [[word:kukafzewoko|kukafzewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukafzewoko|thukafzewoko]] || [[word:jukafzewoko|jukafzewoko]] || [[word:shukafzewoko|shukafzewoko]] || [[word:kukafzewoko|kukafzewoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokafzewoko|thokafzewoko]] || [[word:jokafzewoko|jokafzewoko]] || [[word:shokafzewoko|shokafzewoko]] || [[word:kokafzewoko|kokafzewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokafzewoko|thokafzewoko]] || [[word:jokafzewoko|jokafzewoko]] || [[word:shokafzewoko|shokafzewoko]] || [[word:kokafzewoko|kokafzewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠkafzewoko|thĂŠkafzewoko]] || [[word:jĂŠkafzewoko|jĂŠkafzewoko]] || [[word:shĂŠkafzewoko|shĂŠkafzewoko]] || [[word:kĂŠkafzewoko|kĂŠkafzewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakafzewoko|thathakafzewoko]] || [[word:jajakafzewoko|jajakafzewoko]] || [[word:shashakafzewoko|shashakafzewoko]] || [[word:kakakafzewoko|kakakafzewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakafzewoko|thakafzewoko]] || [[word:jakafzewoko|jakafzewoko]] || [[word:shakafzewoko|shakafzewoko]] || [[word:kakafzewoko|kakafzewoko]]
|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
